rulesStrings.li: r_art_description(p=1)->[ntkmeme_scene]

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] [Quantity_adjphrase] Mirira pulling on a retiring Qiluo. The Mirira look desperate and reluctant to let go. At the bottom are two lines: "What will we eat without you?" "Yeah, what?" [style_clause].

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] a surgical accident. On the operating table lies [ntkmeme_body_shape] [ntkmeme_race], [side_position] is a dragonian doctor saying: "I didn't kill you, the rimworld killed you!"

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] a doctor crying beside a [ntkmeme_race] corpse.[side_position] is a [PersonJob] [desc_pawn], comforting: "A healer's skill grows with every patient treated. In other words, the more patients you kill, the more skilled you become."
ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] a pair of smiling tigers and two black-horned sharks. [style_clause], [symbolizes] something [AdjectiveFriendly] about New Three Kingdoms.

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] tells a story taking place at [ntkmeme_place] in [ntkmeme_location]. A [pawn_adj] [ntkmeme_race] is giving a speech to [Quantity_adjphrase] soldiers: "All forces, hear me! Fight to the last moment, then return to heaven by your own blade!" [style_clause].
ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] a [emotional_expression] dragonian, [idles] at [ntkmeme_location]. [style_clause], with the caption: "Dragon, is a symbol of king!"

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] a [ConceptBadass] [Enemy] at [ntkmeme_location] [ntkmeme_place], facing [Character], saying: "Wait here, watch me stab [ntkmeme_specialCharacter] ten thousand see-through holes!"

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] a [ntkmeme_race] angrily pounds the table, with [emotional_expression_strong] on their face, shouting: "[ntkmeme_specialCharacter] is nothing but a brute! Where did they get the nerve to sneak-attack my [ntkmeme_faction]?" [style_clause].

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] a desk. [side_position], a [PersonJob] is reporting, while a [ntkmeme_race] behind the desk reveals a [ntkmeme_emotional_expression_peace] expression, saying: "That explains it, that explains it." [style_clause].

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] appears to take place in [ntkmeme_location]. [Quantity_adjphrase] [ntkmeme_race] are [ntkmeme_dialogue]: "The women you like are nothing like what [NamePerson] likes. [NamePerson] prefers married young women, especially someone else's wife."

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] two armies face off. On one side is [ntkmeme_specialCharacter], while [side_position], a [ntkmeme_race] is issuing a challenge: "Speak my name and you shall tremble! I am [NamePerson], Supreme General of [ntkmeme_faction]!" [style_clause].
ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] a [strong_emotional_expression] [ntkmeme_specialCharacter]. [side_position] are the words: "Impossible, absolutely impossible!" [style_clause]

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] a [strong_emotional_expression] [ntkmeme_race], [ConceptAngsty] shouting: "Even if it were eighty thousand steamed buns, [ntkmeme_specialCharacter] would need half a month to finish them! How could they just be thrown away!"

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [ntkmeme_specialCharacter] orders: "[NamePerson] insulted me — twenty strokes of the cane!" [side_position], the one being caned looks [AdjectiveAny], crying out while being beaten: "Fool of a leader! Fool, fool, fool of a leader! You are a fool of a leader!" This appears to take place in [ntkmeme_location].

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] a [ntkmeme_race] with a [ntkmeme_emotional_expression_strong] expression, with the caption: "I submitted a petition to [ntkmeme_specialCharacter] requesting to be appointed [ntkmeme_officialPosition], and it was denied! They must have seen my [ntkmeme_faction] growing stronger and deliberately rejected my request!"

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] two [ColorBadass] swords, [style_clause]. The words "Sword of Benevolence" and "Sword of Righteousness" are inscribed on each sword, displaying [ConceptPositive].
ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] two [ntkmeme_race] stand back to back. One [desc_pawn] and speaks: "In this [ntkmeme_faction], who is the real master — you or me?" [style_clause]

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] tells a story at [ntkmeme_place] in [ntkmeme_location]: [ntkmeme_specialCharacter] [desc_pawn], while [side_position], their subordinate is urging them. The other shows no concern, saying: "I've fought battles all my life — can't I enjoy myself a little? Keep the music playing, keep the dancing going!"

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] a [ntkmeme_race] with an [emotional_expression_peace] expression is drinking with another [ntkmeme_race]. The latter [desc_pawn] and says: "I won't be polite — someone, bring me a bigger cup!" [style_clause].

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] a story taking place in [ntkmeme_location]. A [ntkmeme_race] is [ntkmeme_dialogue] with their subordinate. The former [emotional_expression], and speaks with [ConceptBadass]: "Alright then, if they cross the river, I'll cross the river too!" [style_clause].

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] a dragon and a tiger. [style_clause]. [side_position] a line of small text reads: "Wind follows the tiger, clouds follow the dragon — dragon and tiger heroes pierce the heavens."

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] an [ntkmeme_emotional_expression_strong] archotech, pointing at a [ntkmeme_body_shape] corpse: "Impossible! My [ntkmeme_specialCharacter] is invincible! They only ever kill enemies — how could they be killed by one?" [style_clause].

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] a grave in [ntkmeme_location], upon which stands a [Shape] tombstone, inscribed: "Death is not to be feared. Death is a cool summer night, where one may rest peacefully without worry." [style_clause].
ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] an [AdjectiveLarge] sea of flames. [side_position], a [PersonJob] [desc_pawn], sighs: "What a fine fire! Even better than the fire of [ntkmeme_faction]!"

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [style_clause]. It [depicts] a [ntkmeme_body_shape] corpse, with a [ntkmeme_emotional_expression_peace] expression on its face. [side_position] is recorded the musical score of the Song of Guan Yu.
ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] a [ntkmeme_race], [idles] at [side_position], saying: "I'm thinking about my [Animal]s — they each have love and loyalty!"

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] an [image] to us. [side_position], four lines are written end to end: "The victorious grow arrogant, the arrogant face defeat, the defeated feel sorrow, the sorrowful will triumph." It is said this is an ancient Moelotl proverb.

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] several [ntkmeme_race] are [ntkmeme_dialogue], showing [ntkmeme_emotional_expression_peace]. One says: "Unknown fate means dead!" [side_position], [Character] nods in agreement.

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] shows some [ntkmeme_race] [ntkmeme_dialogue], among them a [PersonJob] says: "What kind of person is [ntkmeme_specialCharacter]? Even if you forced her to kill her own parents, she wouldn't even frown!" A second panel shows a [ntkmeme_body_shape] corpse.

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] tells a story taking place in [ntkmeme_location]: a [ntkmeme_race] is weeping for their deceased kin. [side_position], a [PersonJob] [idles], says: "I come with two purposes — one, to grieve with my lord, and two, to congratulate my lord." [style_clause].

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] a [ntkmeme_race] gazing into the distance, saying to those around: "I thought [ntkmeme_specialCharacter] was already invincible — I never expected someone even more fierce. Whose subordinate is this?"

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] a [ntkmeme_race] standing atop the city walls, [desc_pawn], sighing with emotion: "[ntkmeme_faction] is truly the premier fortress of the rimworld." [style_clause].

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] a study. One [ntkmeme_race] asks another: "Is this your study? How come I see not a single book?" The latter replies: "I read one volume, then burn one volume." [style_clause].

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] a [ntkmeme_race] with a [ntkmeme_emotional_expression_strong] expression, shouting at [Quantity_adjphrase] [ntkmeme_race]: "If I hear you gossiping about [ntkmeme_specialCharacter] again, I'll deafen my own ears!"

ntkmeme_scene->[ntkmeme_artwork] [depicts] a story at [ntkmeme_place] in [ntkmeme_location]. [ntkmeme_specialCharacter] [idles], saying: "Since I've already killed the innocent by mistake, every last root must be eliminated. I'd rather betray the world than let the world betray me!"
